creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
X11MON was removed from the OPTIONS_DEFAULT line around four years ago: <https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/deskutils/recoll/Makefile?id=81c61e3cb58367f7a9bbd1183df57245b2e5d4ad>

A visual overview of current defaults: 

┌────────────────────────────── recoll-1.31.2 ─────────────────────────────────┐
│ ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│ │+[x] ASPELL  Spell checking support via GNU Aspell                        │ │
│ │+[x] CHM     Python bindings for Microsoft ITSS/CHM format                │ │
│ │+[ ] DJVU    DjVu document support                                        │ │
│ │+[x] IMAGE   Store personal tags or textual descriptions in images        │ │
│ │+[ ] LATEX   LaTeX support                                                │ │
│ │+[x] PDF     PDF document support                                         │ │
│ │+[x] PS      PostScript document support                                  │ │
│ │+[x] QT5     Qt 5 toolkit support                                         │ │
│ │+[x] SOUND   Sound (audio) support                                        │ │
│ │+[ ] X11MON  X11 session monitoring support                               │ │
│ └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                       <  OK  >            <Cancel>                           │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Since the X11MON option no longer breaks builds (recent <https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/deskutils/recoll/Makefile?id=76d53e6ee5976214a52bf2082efc11d681a9fb20>): 

* please, can we make X11MON a default?

Thank you
